back_translation: And I saw a wild-beast ascending from the sea, having ten horns and seven heads, and on its horns were ten crowns, and on its heads there were names that are blasphemy of God

And the wild-beast that I saw was like a leopard, and the feet of it were like the feet of a bear, and the mouth of it was like the mouth of a lion. And the dragon gave its power, its throne, and great authority to that wild-beast
And one of its heads appeared as if killed unto death, and the wound of death of it was healed already. And the whole earth marveled and followed that wild-beast
And they worshiped the dragon, because it had given authority to the wild-beast. And they worshiped the wild-beast also, saying, ‘Who can equal this wild-beast, and who can wage war against it?’
And it received a mouth that speaks arrogant and blasphemous words, and it received authority to act for forty-two months
And it opened its mouth speaking blasphemy against God, blaspheming His name and His tabernacle, namely those who dwell in heaven
And it received authority to wage war with the saints, and to overcome them. And it received authority over every tribe, every people, every tongue, and every nation
And all who dwell on the earth will worship it, namely the people whose names have not been written from the foundation of the world, in the book of life of the Lamb who was slain
If anyone has an ear, let him hear
‘If anyone is to be taken captive, will be taken captive. If anyone is to be killed by the sword, will be killed by the sword.’ Here is the perseverance and faith of the saints
And I saw another wild-beast ascending from the earth, it had two horns like the horns of a lamb, and spoke like a dragon
And it exercised all the authority of the first wild-beast in its presence. And it caused the earth and those who dwell on it to worship the first wild-beast, whose wound of death was healed
And it performed great signs, even causing fire to fall down from heaven to the earth in the presence of people

And it deceived those who dwell on the earth, by the signs that it received permission to perform in the presence of the wild-beast, and told those who dwell on the earth to make an image to that wild-beast which had a wound from a sword, but still remained alive

And it received permission to give breath to the image of the wild-beast, so that the image of the wild-beast could speak, and to make all those who do not worship the image of the wild-beast be killed
And it forced everyone, both the small and the great, the rich and the poor, the free and the slave, to receive a mark on their right hand or on their forehead
So that no one can buy or sell unless they have that mark, namely the name of the wild-beast or the number of its name
Here, wisdom is needed. The one who has understanding, let him calculate the number of the wild-beast, because it is the number of a man, and the number of it is six-hundred-sixty-six
